scenario: Tenant admin submits the same security policy save twice concurrently, then reads policy back.
expected: Both duplicate writes are stable 200 responses, normalized policy readback matches the submitted body, and the single-row tenant policy invariant is preserved.
actual: Targeted DB/API regression passes: two concurrent PUT calls return 200/200, both response bodies equal normalized policy, GET readback matches, tenant_security_policies row count for tenant-alpha remains 1.
evidence: apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts: keeps tenant security policy save idempotent under duplicate concurrent writes
